Usage:
  grabbit [command]

grab those images!

Available Commands:
  command2   another command
  command3   another command
  grab       do the grabbity grabbity
  repl       Start a REPL to interactively run commands
  version    Print version

Additional Commands:
  completion   Print shell completion scripts
  config       Change grabbit's config
  section2     another section
  section3     another section

Global Flags:
      --color string        Use ANSI colors (default "auto") [env: WARG_COLOR]
  -h, --help string         Print help (default "default")
      --term-width string   Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails (default "auto") [env: WARG_TERM_WIDTH]

Use "grabbit [command] --help" for more information about a command.
